message:
🌱 grpc: [grpcio>=1.68.0][Backup Poller] Client fails to reconnect after server restart (#1559)

* 🌱 Add grpc: [grpcio>=1.68.0][Backup Poller] Client fails to reconnect mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 fix: clean up mission content for grpc backup poller reconnection

Remove issue template boilerplate from step descriptions and
codeSnippets. Replace with clean upgrade commands and fix summary.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-38290-grpcio-1-68-0-backup-poller-client-fails-to-reconnect-after-server-re",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: [grpcio>=1.68.0][Backup Poller] Client fails to reconnect after server restart & Sporadic connection failures due to 'ping timeout'",
+    "description": "[grpcio>=1.68.0][Backup Poller] Client fails to reconnect after server restart & Sporadic connection failures due to 'ping timeout'. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library \u2014 check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nLook for error: `UNKNOWN: ipv6:%5B::1%5D:50051: Failed to connect to remote host: Timeout occurred: FD Shutdown\"`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\nCheck your grpcio version with `pip show grpcio`. This bug affects grpcio versions 1.68.0 through 1.73.0. Versions 1.67.1 and earlier are not affected. The issue manifests as the client failing to reconnect after a server restart, with backup poller connection state handling errors."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [grpcio>=1.68.0][Backup Poller] Client fails to reconnect\u2026",
+        "description": "This bug was fixed in grpcio v1.73.1 and v1.72.2. Upgrade your grpcio package to one of these versions:\n```bash\n# Upgrade to latest fixed version\npip install --upgrade grpcio>=1.73.1\n\n# Or pin to the backport version\npip install grpcio==1.72.2\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade grpc to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade grpc:\nUpdate the grpc dependency in your project manifest to the latest version.\nSee the project's releases: https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [grpcio>=1.68.0][Backup Poller] Client fails to\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that `UNKNOWN: ipv6:%5B::1%5D:50051: Failed to connect to remote host: Timeout occurred: FD Shutdown\"` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The backup poller reconnection bug was fixed in grpcio v1.73.1 (latest) and backported to v1.72.2. The root cause was in the backup poller's connection state handling after server restarts. See releases: v1.73.1 (https://pypi.org/project/grpcio/1.73.1) and v1.72.2 (https://pypi.org/project/grpcio/1.72.2).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Upgrade to latest fixed version\npip install --upgrade grpcio>=1.73.1",
+        "# Or pin to the backport version if you need the 1.72.x line\npip install grpcio==1.72.2"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+      "incubating",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
